Harshit Mittal 

Nidhi Barde

Technical Recruiter | Indore

🚀 We’re Hiring: DevOps Engineer
📍 Location: Remote
 💼 Experience: 3–8 Years
 🕒 Type: Contract 

🤖 About the Role
Be part of building next-generation AI systems!
You’ll contribute to training advanced agentic AI models by creating real-world engineering scenarios, evaluating AI-generated code, and helping improve how AI learns and performs.

🔹 What You’ll Do
▪️ Design real-world DevOps & backend engineering tasks for AI training
▪️Write, review & rank code solutions (Python, Bash, IaC)
▪️Evaluate AI-generated outputs for correctness, security & efficiency
▪️Define acceptance criteria & ground-truth solutions
▪️Contribute to CI/CD, Kubernetes, observability & infrastructure tasks
▪️Collaborate to ensure task quality, diversity & real-world relevance

🔹 Required Skills
▪️3–8 years of hands-on software engineering experience
▪️Strong in Python + (Bash / Go or similar)
▪️Experience with Docker, Kubernetes & container orchestration
▪️Hands-on with CI/CD (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)
▪️Knowledge of Terraform / Infrastructure-as-Code

Familiar with tools like:
▪️Prometheus + Grafana
▪️PostgreSQL / Redis
▪️API design / IAM / gRPC

💡 Why Join?
Work at the intersection of AI + Engineering
Directly impact how future AI systems are trained
Flexible, high-growth freelance opportunity

📩 Interested candidates can apply or share their resume at: nidhi.barde@consulthagnos.com

 🔗 Tag someone who would be a great fit!

Talent Acquisition Lead | Excelling in Contract,Permanent,C2H Staffing | Team Management | Client Acquisition | Technical Recruitment

Hello #connections
We are Hiring!!!

AI Engineer
5+ years
Contract Remote

JD 
Proven track record of building and deploying real‑world AI applications.
Deep proficiency in Python and core AI/ML libraries such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Hugging Face.
Strong understanding of prompt engineering, model fine‑tuning, evaluation, and orchestration workflows.
Hands-on experience with Azure AI services (Azure OpenAI, Azure ML, etc.).
Ability to work independently, take initiative, and make strong technical decisions with minimal supervision.


Competencies (Skills Needed on Day 1)
Ability to design and develop AI solutions using Generative AI, LLMs, and Agentic AI frameworks.
Capability to rapidly prototype and iterate on POCs, emphasizing functionality, scalability, and business impact.
Experience integrating Copilot-based solutions into enterprise workflows to deliver seamless user experiences.
Strong ability to translate business requirements into technical implementations with minimal handholding.
Demonstrated self-learning mindset, staying current with emerging AI tools, libraries, and frameworks—and applying them effectively.
Experience deploying AI applications on Azure Cloud to enable quick demonstrations and smooth handover to application teams (good to have).

Interested candidates please share your resumes to aswathy.r@ellow.io

🚀 Hiring: Senior Data Scientist (GenAI | Remote – Vietnam)
I’m currently supporting a Singapore-based client in the Agri-tech space to find a Senior Data Scientist who will work on impactful GenAI projects 🌱
What makes this role interesting:
- Hands-on with GenAI (2+ years experience)
- Opportunity to build solutions using AWS Bedrock / AWS AI
- Real-world impact in agriculture with meaningful data problems
💰 Salary: 50M – 55M NET
 🕘 Working: Mon–Fri (9AM–6PM, Vietnam time)
 📍 100% Remote (based in Vietnam)
 📄 Contract: 1 year (open for 2nd job candidates)
👉 Looking for someone who:
- Has ~7+ years of experience in Data Science
- Strong hands-on experience with GenAI
- Experience with AWS (Bedrock is a big plus)
- Fluent in English (working with international teams)
- Interview process: ~3 rounds
If you’re looking for a practical GenAI role with global exposure and flexible remote setup, this could be a great fit.
📩 Feel free to reach out if you’re interested or know someone suitable!

Sonali Nayak

2h • Edited •   

Talent Acquisition Specialist | HR Professional🌟| Global Recruitment🌐|27100+ Followers| Hiring for India -Singapore-Malaysia-Philippines| APAC & Domestic IT Hiring | ATS | BCA(Computer Application)| MBA HR &Marketing |

📢 We’re Hiring: 🔍 Role: AI Engineer ,📍 Location: Singapore (Onsite)
⏰ Experience: 5 Years above  ,🔍Job type : 12-Month Contract 
We are seeking a skilled machine learning platform engineer (MLOps)  In this role, Bridge the gap between experimental data science and production-grade systems. 

💼 Key Responsibilities
 ✔Design, develop and deploy machine learning solutions and services
✔Implement end-to-end machine learning pipelines from data ingestion to training and model serving
✔Operationalize LLMs, embeddings, and multi-agent systems in real-world applications
✔Manage the machine learning and model lifecycle (experimentation, registry, deployment)
✔Containerize applications using Docker and orchestrate them via Kubernetes
✔Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for ML models and LLM applications
✔Collaborate with data scientists to refactor research code into production-ready Python code
✔Monitor model performance, data drift, and performance in production
✔Assess and integrate AI solutions ensuring optimal performance and reliability
✔Design and implement production grade RAG systems
✔Collaborate with infrastructure teams, data engineers, data scientists, and other stakeholders to integrate machine learning solutions into existing systems and processes
✔Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging to ensure the quality and reliability of machine learning solutions

💡Required Skills
 ✔ Bachelor's or Master's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field
✔Advanced proficiency in Python programming with a focus on writing clean, testable and efficient code
✔DevOps & Containers: Proficient with Docker for containerization and working knowledge of Kubernetes (k8s) for orchestration
✔Practical understanding of GPU architecture and cloud compute instances to optimize resource allocation for training and inference workloads
✔MLOPS tools: hands on experience with MLflow (or similar tools like weights & biases) for experiment tracking and model registry
✔Proven experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs)
✔Good understanding of AI agents & agentic workflows, LLM orchestration frameworks and reasoning patterns
✔Experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model selection and evaluation techniques
✔Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitLab, Jenkins)
✔Knowledge of statistical and mathematical concepts relevant to machine learning, such as probability, linear algebra, and optimization

📩 Interested or know someone who’d be a great fit?
Drop your CV in the comments or DM me directly! sonali.nayak@accordinnovations.com
🔁 Tag someone who might be interested or share this opportunity!

#DataScience #DevOps  #Container #Docker #Python #ArtificialIntelligence 
#ContractJobs #RAG #AgenticAI #CICD #GitLab #Jenkins #AIJobs #AIML

extracted.role_title: AI Engineer / Machine Learning Platform Engineer (MLOps)
extracted.role_summary: Seeking a skilled machine learning platform engineer (MLOps) to bridge the gap between experimental data science and production-grade systems.

extracted.full_content:
Laraib Khan

Srinivas, this MLOps role cuts to the heart of what many teams miss—operationalizing AI without losing visibility into how models actually behave in production.

The shift toward agentic workflows and RAG systems you're describing is exactly where sovereign infrastructure becomes critical: teams need to audit, localize, and override their AI systems, not just deploy and hope.

Worth flagging for candidates who care about building accountable, inspectable intelligence 🚀

Srinivas Santhosh Kumar Rajamahanthi

Global IT Talent Acquisition Specialist | Singapore • Malaysia • India • USA | Hiring Strategist | Building High-Performing Tech Teams

🚀 We’re Hiring: Machine Learning Platform Engineer (MLOps) | Singapore (Onsite) | 12-Month Contract 🚀
Are you ready to bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and production-grade systems? Join our Agile ML & AI team and help build scalable, intelligent, and autonomous AI-driven platforms!

Role Overview
 As a Machine Learning Platform Engineer (MLOps), you will play a key role in transforming experimental data science into production-ready solutions. You’ll work across the full lifecycle—from concept to deployment—while enabling advanced agentic AI workflows.

Key Responsibilities
 ✅ Design, develop, and deploy scalable ML solutions
 ✅ Build end-to-end ML pipelines (data ingestion → training → serving)
 ✅ Operationalize LLMs, embeddings & multi-agent systems
 ✅ Design and implement production-grade RAG systems
 ✅ Manage ML lifecycle (experimentation, registry, deployment)
 ✅ Handle model promotion workflows with validation gates
 ✅ Containerize applications using Docker & orchestrate via Kubernetes
 ✅ Develop CI/CD pipelines for ML & LLM applications
 ✅ Monitor model performance, drift & reliability in production
 ✅ Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions

Required Skills
 🔹 Strong Python programming (clean, testable, scalable code)
 🔹 Hands-on with MLflow / Weights & Biases
 🔹 Experience with LLMs, AI agents & orchestration frameworks
 🔹 CI/CD tools: GitLab, Jenkins
 🔹 Containers: Docker | Kubernetes
 🔹 Data preprocessing, feature engineering & model evaluation
 🔹 Knowledge of cloud & GPU-based compute optimization

What We’re Looking For
 ✔ Proven experience in MLOps / ML Engineering
 ✔ Strong analytical & problem-solving skills
 ✔ Ability to work in Agile, cross-functional teams
 ✔ Passion for AI innovation & continuous learning
 ✔ Bachelor’s/Master’s in CS, Data Science, or related field

Why Join?
 ✨ Work on next-gen AI systems & autonomous agents
 ✨ High-impact role in a cutting-edge ML platform team
 ✨ Exposure to enterprise-grade AI deployments

📩 Interested? Let’s connect or drop your profile! 
mahanthi.srinivas@accordinnovations.com

Nitya Pande

Tech Hiring @ Softbay | Staff Augmentation | MBA–MIT WPU

‼️Remote Opportunity | AWS Data Engineer | Contract
🔹 Experience: 5+ Years
🔹Contract duration: 6 months (extendable)
🔹 Shift: 11 AM – 8 PM

💡 Must-Have Skills:
✔️ AWS Data Engineering – S3, Glue, Athena, Lambda
✔️ Step Functions, Lake Formation, KMS, CloudWatch
✔️ Advanced SQL & Data Modeling
✔️ Python & PySpark
✔️ Data Lake Architecture
✔️ Apache Iceberg
✔️ Infrastructure as Code – Terraform / CloudFormation

⭐ Good to Have:
✔️ CI/CD & DevOps familiarity
✔️ Git, JIRA, SonarQube
✔️ AWS CDK
✔️ AI-assisted development tools

📌 Key Responsibilities:
-Build and optimize ETL pipelines on AWS
-Design fact & dimension data models for analytics
-Implement Iceberg-based lakehouse solutions
-Manage Lake Formation permissions and governance
-Develop robust data quality checks and alerting
-Maintain infrastructure using Terraform / CDK
-Contribute to CI/CD, testing, and deployments
-Ensure security with IAM, KMS, and audit logging
-Monitor pipelines with CloudWatch alerts
-Collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders

Interested candidates can send their resume to nitya.pande@softbay.com or DM me
